reviews.comment:
Siempre lleno!! Muy caro el shopping. Excesivo. Tiene buena ubicación y un estacionamiento arbolado para descansar. Aire para las ruedas

(Translated by Google)
Always crowded! The shopping mall is very expensive. Overpriced. It has a good location and a tree-lined parking lot where you can relax. Air in your tires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRamE2X1BBEAE

reviews.comment:
Llené el tanque y no me aceptaron el pago con tarjeta de ningún tipo, Solo efectivo. Muy mal Sres!

(Translated by Google)
I filled up my tank and they wouldn't accept any card payment, only cash. Very bad, sirs!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3b1pDZnpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todos los servicios. Cobran con tarjeta

(Translated by Google)
All services. Credit cards accepted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMkpEWkx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria, mala atención, carísimo todo, hasta el agua para el mate. Según el horario no está habiendo el restaurante ni el kiosco. Pasé a las 22:00, el expendio de combustible era solamente de contado y cansado por el viaje no me daba para volver atrás a otra estación de servicio, por lo cual cargue el poco dinero que llevaba encima.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop, terrible service, everything is ridiculously expensive, even the water for mate. According to the schedule, the restaurant and kiosk were closed. I went at 10:00 PM; they only sold fuel for cash, and tired from the trip, I didn't have the money to go back to another station, so I filled up with the little cash I had on me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBd3Flb1B3EAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada a cargar nafta, estirar las piernas y comer algo (un buen restaurante) y previa para agarrar la ruta 40 hacia la PATAGAONIA!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop to refuel, stretch your legs and grab a bite to eat (at a good restaurant) and a prelude to hitting Route 40 towards PATAGONIA!
